decoration.label: Decoration Map
decoration.title: Systematic Renovation Knowledge, Clear Process in One Map
decoration.description: From plumbing to soft furnishings, the decoration map covers key nodes throughout the renovation process. Through visual mind mapping, it helps users establish a systematic knowledge framework and avoid missing important steps.

comingSoon.label: Coming Soon
comingSoon.title: More Practical Tools in Development
comingSoon.description: We continuously explore pain points in daily life, committed to building simple and efficient digital products. Each tool undergoes careful design and refinement to ensure it truly solves user problems.

about.label: Our Philosophy
about.title: Technology Should Make Life Simpler, Not More Complex

paragraphs.p1: In this era of information overload, we find too many tools designed to be overly complex, actually increasing users' cognitive burden. Qingzao was born from a simple belief: good products should be as natural as air—you almost don't feel its presence, but it's always there helping you.
paragraphs.p2: Every product starts from real needs. We don't chase trends or pile on features, we only focus on solving one specific problem and doing it best. The decoration map was born this way—we found that information is scattered and processes are chaotic during renovation, so we created a clear mind map to help users establish a systematic cognitive framework.
paragraphs.p3: In the future, we will continue to uphold this philosophy and build more simple and practical tools. If you have similar ideas, we welcome you to connect with us.

contact.label: Contact Us
contact.title: Looking Forward to Connecting
contact.description: Whether it's product feedback, partnership inquiries, or just want to chat, we welcome your message.

brand.desc: Creating practical tools, making work simpler
